title: Blizcot
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''blizcot''' was a [[Hapan]] [[Bird/Legends|birdhouse]] for keeping [[bliz]].<ref name="DarkJourney">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''</ref>

{{Struct-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The blizcot was introduced in [[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey|''Dark Journey'']], [[Elaine Cunningham]]'s [[2002]] tenth entry in the ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' novel series.<ref name="DarkJourney" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''
